scripts.dev: pnpm dlx concurrently "pnpm run watch:css" "trunk serve --port 8080 --open"
scripts.sync:config: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); const pub=require('./package.publish.json'); pub.version=pkg.version; require('fs').writeFileSync('./pkg/package.json', JSON.stringify(pub, null, 2))"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:css && pnpm run prep:pkg && pnpm run sync:config
scripts.release: npm version patch && pnpm run build
